ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sermons" (
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sermon */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the sermon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sermon */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sermon was delivered */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who delivered the sermon */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the sermon was delivered */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the sermon belongs to */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the sermon is based on */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the sermon covers */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sermon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sermon is active */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the sermon */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the sermon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sermon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES sermon_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES sermon_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES sermon_books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermons_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campus */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the campus */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the speaker within the organization */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's photo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the speaker is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the series is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "book_name" TEXT /* Name of the book */,
  "book_description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the book is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., slides, notes) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_documents_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_series_sermons" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id", "sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_books_sermons" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_topics_sermons" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id", "sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pastor, sermon editor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sermon */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sermon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the sermon */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the sermon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment accompanying the rating */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon marked as favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user marking the sermon as favorite */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the favorite is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sermon_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sermon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sermon */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sermon_versions_sermon_id FOREIGN KEY ("sermon_id") REFERENCES sermons ("sermon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_key" TEXT /* Key for the data entry */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value for the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
